---
title: "Certificates"
toc: false
---

## Academic Credentials

**Graduate Teaching Certificate**  
University of Texas at Dallas

**Graduate Certificate Geospatial Information Sciences**  
University of Texas at Dallas

## ESRI / ArcGIS Training

- Deep Learning Using ArcGIS Pro
- Integrating R Scripts into ArcGIS Geoprocessing Tools
- Mapping Clusters: Hot Spot and Cluster and Outlier Analysis
- Mapping Clusters: Optimized Hot Spot and Optimized Outlier Analysis
- Mapping Clusters: Introduction to Statistical Cluster Analysis
- Regression Analysis: Building a Regression Model Using ArcGIS Pro
- Regression Analysis: Performing Random Forest Regression Using ArcGIS Pro
- Spatial Data Science: The New Frontier in Analytics
- Suitability Modeling: Creating a Weighted Suitability Model
- Suitability Modeling: Creating a Simple Suitability Model
- Using the R-ArcGIS Bridge
